name: documentation-review
author: LerianStudio
description:
Comprehensive checklist and process for reviewing documentation quality
including voice, tone, structure, completeness, and technical accuracy.
description_zh: 该技能提供了一个结构化检查清单，用于从语调、结构、完整性、清晰度和技术准确性五个维度审查文档。它包含每个维度的具体检查标准、常见问题标记以及清晰的输出格式和优先级划分，帮助在发布前发现文档问题。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured checklist for reviewing documentation across voice, structure, completeness, clarity, and technical accuracy. It offers specific criteria for each dimension, common issues to flag, and a clear output format with priority levels. The tool helps catch documentation problems before publication.

name: documentation-structure
author: LerianStudio
description:
Patterns for organizing and structuring documentation including hierarchy,
navigation, and information architecture.
description_zh: 一份全面实用的技术文档结构指南，提供清晰的模式、层级示例和可操作的内容组织检查清单。
_original_description: A comprehensive and practical guide for structuring technical documentation with clear patterns, hierarchy examples, and actionable checklists for content organization.

name: executing-plans
author: LerianStudio
description:
Controlled plan execution with human review checkpoints - loads plan, executes
in batches, pauses for feedback. Supports one-go (autonomous) or batch modes.
description_zh: 一个结构良好的技能，用于受控的计划执行，具有强制的人工审查检查点，提供清晰的执行模式和稳健的代码审查集成。
_original_description: A well-structured skill for controlled plan execution with mandatory human review checkpoints, offering clear execution modes and robust code review integration.

name: executive-reporting
author: LerianStudio
description:
Executive communication and reporting skill for creating dashboards, status summaries,
and board packages. Focuses on actionable insights for leadership.
description_zh: 一个用于创建高管级别报告和仪表板的高度结构化、专业的技能，具有清晰的框架、实用的模板和稳健的质量关卡。
_original_description: A highly structured and professional skill for creating executive-level reports and dashboards, featuring clear frameworks, practical templates, and robust quality gates.

name: exploring-codebase
author: LerianStudio
description:
Autonomous two-phase codebase exploration - first discovers natural perspectives
(layers, components, boundaries), then dispatches adaptive deep-dive explorers
based on what was discovered. Synthesizes findings into actionable insights.
description_zh: 创新的自主代码库探索技能，采用结构化两阶段方法，系统发现架构模式并进行针对性深度探索，有效解决代码探索中的常见认知偏差。
_original_description: An innovative autonomous codebase exploration skill with a structured two-phase approach that systematically discovers architecture patterns and performs targeted deep dives, addressing common cognitive biases in code exploration.

name: financial-analysis
author: LerianStudio
description:
Comprehensive financial analysis workflow covering ratio analysis, trend analysis,
benchmarking, and variance analysis. Delivers documented, audit-ready insights.
description_zh: 该技能提供了一个结构化的五阶段财务分析工作流，强制要求数据验证和审计文档。它将任务分派给专门的财务分析师代理，确保计算可追溯且结论有证据支持。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured five-phase workflow for financial statement analysis, enforcing data verification and audit documentation. It dispatches tasks to a specialized financial-analyst agent, ensuring calculations are traceable and conclusions are supported by evidence.

name: financial-close
author: LerianStudio
description:
Month-end and year-end close workflow covering journal entries, reconciliations,
close procedures, and audit preparation. Delivers accurate, timely close with full audit trail.
description_zh: 该技能提供了一个结构化的六阶段财务结账工作流，涵盖期前准备、交易处理、账户核对、调整分录、审核和最终完成。它包含详细的检查清单、反合理化表格，并调度会计专家代理执行对账。流程强制执行关键步骤和文档标准，以确保结账准确并保留完整审计线索。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured, six-phase workflow for month-end and year-end financial closing. It guides users through pre-close preparation, transaction processing, account reconciliations, adjustments, review, and finalization. It includes specific checklists, anti-rationalization tables, and dispatches a specialized accounting agent to perform reconciliations. The process enforces mandatory steps and documentation standards to ensure an accurate close with a full audit trail.

name: financial-modeling
author: LerianStudio
description:
Financial modeling workflow for DCF, LBO, merger, and operating models.
Delivers validated, documented models with sensitivity and scenario analysis.
description_zh: 这是一个结构化的财务建模工作流，通过六个阶段指导用户完成：界定范围、架构设计、假设设定、模型构建、验证测试和文档编制。它强制执行最佳实践，如输入隔离、禁止硬编码和强制敏感性分析，并调度至专门的financial-modeler代理。
_original_description: A structured workflow for financial modeling that guides users through six phases: scoping, architecture, assumptions, build, validation, and documentation. It enforces best practices like input separation, no hardcoding, and mandatory sensitivity analysis while dispatching to a specialized financial-modeler agent.

name: financial-reporting
author: LerianStudio
description:
Financial reporting workflow covering report preparation, management reporting,
board presentations, and investor communications. Delivers polished, accurate reports.
description_zh: 该技能提供了一个结构化的五阶段财务报告工作流，从需求收集到分发。它强制执行验证步骤，包含针对不同报告类型的检查清单，并调度到专门的子代理进行分析。该技能明确处理常见的报告压力和合理化借口，以保持准确性。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured five-phase workflow for creating financial reports, from requirements gathering to distribution. It enforces mandatory verification steps, includes specific checklists for different report types, and dispatches to specialized sub-agents for analysis. The skill explicitly handles common reporting pressures and rationalizations to maintain accuracy.

name: finishing-a-development-branch
author: LerianStudio
description:
Branch completion workflow - guides merge/PR/cleanup decisions after implementation
is verified complete.
description_zh: 该技能为完成开发分支提供结构化工作流，包含四种明确选项：本地合并、创建PR、保留分支或丢弃工作。强制执行测试验证，并适当处理工作树清理。流程包含具体的git命令和危险操作确认提示。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured workflow for completing development branches with four clear options: merge locally, create PR, keep as-is, or discard. It enforces test verification before proceeding and handles worktree cleanup appropriately. The step-by-step process includes specific git commands and confirmation prompts for destructive actions.

name: gtm-planning
author: LerianStudio
description:
Go-to-market planning skill for developing channel strategy, tactics,
timeline, and budget allocation for product launches.
description_zh: 该技能生成结构化的上市计划，包含策略、渠道选择、战术、时间线和预算等明确阶段。它强制要求完成定位等先决条件，并包含阻止标准以防止过早规划。输出为详细的Markdown文档，可供利益相关者审查。
_original_description: This skill generates structured go-to-market plans with clear phases for strategy, channel selection, tactics, timeline, and budget. It enforces prerequisites like positioning completion and includes blocker criteria to prevent premature planning. The output is a detailed markdown document ready for stakeholder review.

name: interviewing-user
author: LerianStudio
description:
Proactive requirements gathering - systematically interviews the user to uncover
ambiguities, preferences, and constraints BEFORE implementation begins.
description_zh: 一个结构良好的技能，用于在实施前通过系统化访谈用户来澄清需求，防止因错误假设造成的返工浪费。
_original_description: A well-structured skill for systematic requirements gathering that proactively interviews users to resolve ambiguities before implementation, preventing wasted effort from incorrect assumptions.

name: launch-execution
author: LerianStudio
description:
Launch coordination skill for managing launch checklists, stakeholder alignment,
and day-of execution for product and feature launches.
description_zh: 一个全面且结构化的产品发布执行框架，提供了从就绪评估到发布后监控的清晰流程、检查清单和模板。
_original_description: A comprehensive and well-structured launch execution framework that provides clear processes, checklists, and templates for managing product launches from readiness assessment through post-launch monitoring.

name: linting-codebase
author: LerianStudio
description:
Parallel lint fixing pattern - runs lint checks, groups issues into independent
streams, and dispatches AI agents to fix all issues until the codebase is clean.
description_zh: 一个结构良好的并行lint修复技能，具有清晰的约束条件和分阶段方法，但实际实施可能面临代理协调和lint工具兼容性挑战。
_original_description: A well-structured skill for parallel lint fixing with clear constraints and phased approach, though practical implementation may face challenges with agent coordination and lint tool compatibility.

name: market-analysis
author: LerianStudio
description:
Systematic market analysis skill for understanding market size, segmentation,
trends, and opportunities. Produces quantified market intelligence.
description_zh: 一个全面、系统的市场分析框架，具有清晰阶段、结构化输出和产品质量门控，适用于产品/市场战略。
_original_description: A comprehensive, systematic market analysis framework with clear phases, structured outputs, and quality gates for product/market strategy.

name: messaging-creation
author: LerianStudio
description:
Messaging framework skill for developing value propositions, proof points,
and consistent messaging across audiences and channels.
description_zh: 该技能提供从产品定位到渠道文案的结构化信息框架创建流程。它强制要求前置条件，包含反合理化表格，并输出详细的价值主张、证据点和异议处理的Markdown模板。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured process for creating messaging frameworks, from positioning to channel-specific copy. It enforces prerequisites, includes anti-rationalization tables, and outputs detailed markdown templates for value propositions, proof points, and objection handling.

name: metrics-dashboard
author: LerianStudio
description:
KPI and metrics dashboard workflow covering metric definition, data sourcing,
visualization design, and anomaly detection. Delivers actionable dashboards.
description_zh: 该技能提供了一个结构化的5阶段KPI仪表板设计流程，从需求收集到实施。它强制执行指标和数据源的文档标准，包含压力抵抗模式，并调度专门的指标分析师代理。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured 5-phase workflow for designing KPI dashboards, from requirements gathering to implementation. It enforces documentation standards for metrics and data sources, includes pressure resistance patterns, and dispatches to a specialized metrics-analyst agent.

name: ops-capacity-planning
author: LerianStudio
description:
Structured workflow for infrastructure capacity planning including growth
forecasting, scaling strategy, and resource provisioning decisions.
description_zh: 一个结构清晰、内容全面的基础设施容量规划工作流，为云运维团队提供了实用的分阶段指导和模板。
_original_description: A comprehensive, structured workflow for infrastructure capacity planning with clear phases, templates, and practical guidance for cloud operations teams.

name: ops-cost-optimization
author: LerianStudio
description:
Structured workflow for cloud cost analysis and optimization including
rightsizing, reserved capacity planning, and FinOps practices.
description_zh: 提供结构化的六阶段云成本优化工作流，涵盖成本可视化、异常检测、资源优化、风险评估、实施和监控。包含具体的成本分解、异常报告和节省追踪模板，并给出明确的阈值和示例。
_original_description: Provides a structured six-phase workflow for cloud cost analysis, covering visibility, anomaly detection, rightsizing, risk assessment, implementation, and monitoring. Includes specific templates for cost breakdowns, anomaly reports, and savings tracking with concrete thresholds and examples.

name: ops-disaster-recovery
author: LerianStudio
description:
Structured workflow for disaster recovery planning, implementation, and testing
including RTO/RPO definition, DR strategy selection, and failover procedures.
description_zh: 提供从业务影响分析到维护的六阶段灾难恢复结构化工作流。包含BIA文档、策略选择矩阵、架构图和可执行故障转移手册的具体模板。指导团队定义RTO/RPO、选择策略和执行测试。
_original_description: Provides a structured, six-phase workflow for disaster recovery planning, from business impact analysis to maintenance. Includes concrete templates for BIA documents, strategy selection matrices, architecture diagrams, and executable failover runbooks. Guides teams through defining RTO/RPO, choosing strategies, and conducting tests.

name: ops-incident-response
author: LerianStudio
description:
Structured workflow for production incident management following SRE best practices.
Covers incident declaration, triage, coordination, resolution, and post-mortem.
description_zh: 提供了一个从事件检测到事后分析的结构化、分阶段的生产事件处理流程。包含严重性分级、角色分配、沟通模板和检查清单。可与事件响应代理集成处理复杂情况，并提供反合理化指导。
_original_description: Provides a structured, phase-based workflow for handling production incidents from detection to post-mortem. Includes severity classification, role assignments, communication templates, and checklists. Integrates with an incident-responder agent for complex cases and offers anti-rationalization guidance.

name: ops-migration-planning
author: LerianStudio
description:
Structured workflow for infrastructure migration planning including cloud migrations,
technology upgrades, and data center transitions.
description_zh: 为基础设施迁移规划提供结构化的8阶段工作流，包含详细的发现、评估、规划和执行模板。专门针对云和数据中心迁移，提供实用的检查清单、风险登记册和成本分析模板。
_original_description: Provides a structured 8-phase workflow for infrastructure migration planning with detailed templates for discovery, assessment, planning, and execution. Includes practical checklists, risk registers, and cost analysis templates specifically for cloud and data center migrations.

name: ops-platform-onboarding
author: LerianStudio
description:
Structured workflow for onboarding new services to the internal platform
including infrastructure provisioning, observability setup, and documentation.
description_zh: 一个高度结构化、全面的内部开发者平台服务接入工作流，涵盖基础设施、可观测性、安全和文档，模板清晰。
_original_description: A highly structured and comprehensive workflow for onboarding services to an internal developer platform, covering infrastructure, observability, security, and documentation with clear templates.

name: ops-security-audit
author: LerianStudio
description:
Structured workflow for infrastructure security audits including compliance
validation, vulnerability assessment, and security posture review.
description_zh: 为基础设施安全审计提供了一个结构化的六阶段工作流，涵盖范围定义到验证。包含审计计划、扫描命令、审查清单、合规性映射和修复跟踪的具体模板。明确定义了触发条件和使用相关技能的时机。
_original_description: Provides a structured six-phase workflow for infrastructure security audits, from scoping to verification. Includes specific templates for audit plans, scanning commands, review checklists, compliance mapping, and remediation tracking. Clearly defines triggers and when to use related skills.

name: pmo-retrospective
author: LerianStudio
description:
Portfolio retrospective skill for capturing lessons learned, process improvements,
and organizational learning across completed projects.
description_zh: 提供了一个用于进行项目组合层面回顾的六步结构化框架，从背景设定到知识共享。包含具体模板、反合理化表格和阻塞标准，确保产出可执行行动。该技能专为项目管理部门设计，用于系统性地捕获和应用项目经验教训。
_original_description: Provides a structured six-gate framework for conducting portfolio-level retrospectives, from context setting to knowledge sharing. It includes specific templates, anti-rationalization tables, and blocker criteria to ensure actionable outcomes. The skill is designed for PMOs to systematically capture and apply lessons learned across projects.

name: portfolio-planning
author: LerianStudio
description:
Strategic portfolio planning skill for multi-project coordination, capacity assessment,
and portfolio optimization. Provides framework for portfolio-level decision making.
description_zh: 一个全面且结构清晰的投资组合规划框架，具备明确阶段、优秀文档和与相关技能的良好集成。
_original_description: A comprehensive and well-structured portfolio planning framework with clear gates, excellent documentation, and strong integration with related skills.

name: positioning-development
author: LerianStudio
description:
Strategic positioning skill for developing differentiated market position,
positioning statements, and competitive framing.
description_zh: 该技能为产品定位策略开发提供结构化框架，通过清晰的模板和验证步骤，引导用户完成品类选择、竞品分析、差异化识别和定位声明创建。它强制要求先完成市场分析，并包含防合理化模式以避免常见错误。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured framework for developing product positioning strategies. It guides users through category selection, competitive analysis, differentiation identification, and positioning statement creation with clear templates and validation steps. It enforces prerequisite market analysis and includes anti-rationalization patterns to prevent common mistakes.

name: pre-dev-api-design
author: LerianStudio
description:
Gate 4: API contracts document - defines component interfaces and data contracts
before protocol/technology selection. Large Track only.
description_zh: 在技术选型前强制执行契约优先的API设计阶段。提供清晰的抽象接口定义规则、验证清单和模板，用于记录操作、事件和约束，不涉及协议细节。
_original_description: Enforces a contract-first API design phase before technology selection. Provides clear rules for abstract interface definition, a validation checklist, and templates to document operations, events, and constraints without protocol details.

name: pre-dev-data-model
author: LerianStudio
description:
Gate 5: Data structures document - defines entities, relationships, and ownership
before database technology selection. Large Track only.
description_zh: 在数据库实现前创建技术无关数据模型的标准化流程。通过明确规则、检查清单和验证关卡，强制分离概念建模与实现细节。
_original_description: A structured process for creating technology-agnostic data models before database implementation. It enforces separation of conceptual modeling from implementation details with clear rules, checklists, and validation gates.

name: pre-dev-dependency-map
author: LerianStudio
description:
Gate 6: Technology choices document - explicit, versioned, validated technology
selections with justifications. Large Track only. HARD BLOCK: Must load Ring Standards
and PROJECT_RULES.md before proceeding.
description_zh: 一个高度结构化的依赖映射技能，通过严格的关卡工作流强制要求明确的技术选择、版本控制、安全验证和标准合规性。
_original_description: A highly structured dependency mapping skill that enforces explicit technology choices with version control, security validation, and standards compliance through a rigorous gated workflow.

name: pre-dev-feature-map
author: LerianStudio
description:
Gate 2: Feature relationship map - visualizes feature landscape, groupings,
and interactions at business level before technical architecture.
description_zh: 一个在技术设计前进行功能关系映射的高度结构化流程，能有效防止架构与业务不匹配，确保开发与业务目标对齐。
_original_description: A highly structured and disciplined process for mapping feature relationships before technical design, preventing architectural mismatches and ensuring business-aligned development.

name: pre-dev-prd-creation
author: LerianStudio
description:
Gate 1: Business requirements document - defines WHAT/WHY before HOW.
Creates PRD with problem definition, user stories, success metrics.
description_zh: 该技能强制分离业务需求（PRD）与技术设计。它提供了一个结构化工作流，用于在定义“如何”之前明确“什么”和“为什么”，包含清晰的触发条件、验证关卡以及关于PRD与技术文档内容的明确规则。它还在业务层面包含了安全需求发现。
_original_description: This skill enforces strict separation of business requirements (PRD) from technical design. It provides a structured workflow for defining WHAT and WHY before HOW, with clear triggers, validation gates, and explicit rules for what belongs in a PRD versus technical documents. It includes security requirement discovery at the business level.

name: pre-dev-research
author: LerianStudio
description:
Gate 0 research phase for pre-dev workflow. Dispatches 4 parallel research agents
to gather codebase patterns, external best practices, framework documentation,
and UX/product research BEFORE creating PRD/TRD. Outputs research.md with
file:line references and user research findings.
description_zh: 一个结构良好的研究优先工作流工具，在开发规划前系统性地收集代码库模式、最佳实践和文档，降低实施风险。
_original_description: A well-structured research-first workflow tool that systematically gathers codebase patterns, best practices, and documentation before development planning, reducing implementation risks.

name: pre-dev-subtask-creation
author: LerianStudio
description:
Gate 8: Zero-context implementation steps - 2-5 minute atomic subtasks with
complete code, exact commands, TDD pattern. Large Track only.
description_zh: 该技能为不熟悉代码库的开发者创建详细、自包含的实现子任务。它强制执行严格的TDD循环（红-绿-重构），每个步骤2-5分钟，提供完整代码、精确命令和明确验证。适用于需要并行工作的大型功能开发。
_original_description: This skill creates detailed, self-contained implementation subtasks for developers with zero codebase context. It enforces a strict TDD cycle (RED-GREEN-REFACTOR) with 2-5 minute atomic steps, complete code snippets, exact commands, and explicit verification. It's designed for large features requiring parallelizable work.

name: pre-dev-task-breakdown
author: LerianStudio
description:
Gate 7: Implementation tasks - value-driven decomposition into working increments
that deliver measurable user value.
description_zh: 该技能提供了一个结构化框架，用于将产品需求分解为能交付用户价值的开发任务。它强制执行任务不超过2周、需明确成功标准、每个任务必须产出可演示软件等规则。包含验证清单、模板和常见错误示例来指导团队。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured framework for breaking down product requirements into development tasks that deliver user value. It enforces rules like no tasks over 2 weeks, requires explicit success criteria, and mandates that every task results in demoable software. It includes validation checklists, templates, and common violation examples to guide teams.

name: pre-dev-trd-creation
author: LerianStudio
description:
Gate 3: Technical architecture document - defines HOW/WHERE with technology-agnostic
patterns before concrete implementation choices.
description_zh: 该技能强制执行创建技术无关技术需求文档（TRD）的严格关卡。它阻止技术细节决策，强制加载组织标准，并在选择具体实现方案前，指导团队完成抽象的架构模式设计。
_original_description: This Skill enforces a strict gate for creating Technology-Agnostic Technical Requirements Documents (TRDs). It blocks technology-specific decisions, mandates loading of organizational standards, and guides teams through abstract architectural pattern selection before implementation choices.

name: pricing-strategy
author: LerianStudio
description:
Pricing analysis skill for developing pricing models, competitive pricing analysis,
and pricing recommendations for products and features.
description_zh: 该技能提供了一个结构化框架，用于制定产品定价策略。它引导用户完成五个阶段：背景收集、模型分析、竞争研究、价值评估和最终建议。输出结果为详细的Markdown报告，适合利益相关者审阅。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured framework for developing product pricing strategies. It guides users through five phases: context gathering, model analysis, competitive research, value assessment, and final recommendations. The output is a detailed markdown report suitable for stakeholder review.

name: project-health-check
author: LerianStudio
description:
Individual project health assessment skill for evaluating project status across
multiple dimensions. Provides early warning of troubled projects.
description_zh: 为评估单个项目健康状况提供了一个结构化框架，涵盖进度、成本、范围、质量、风险和利益相关者六个维度。包含具体指标、评估问题、加权评分系统，能生成带根本原因分析和优先级建议的详细报告。设有明确的反合理化规则和针对关键问题的升级标准。
_original_description: Provides a structured framework for evaluating individual project health across six dimensions (schedule, cost, scope, quality, risk, stakeholder). Includes specific metrics, assessment questions, and a weighted scoring system. Generates detailed reports with root cause analysis and prioritized recommendations. Has clear anti-rationalization rules and escalation criteria for critical issues.

name: receiving-code-review
author: LerianStudio
description:
Review reception protocol - requires technical verification before implementing
suggestions. Prevents performative agreement and blind implementation.
description_zh: 一个高度实用的技能，建立了严谨、非表演性的代码审查反馈接收与实施协议，具备出色的技术保障。
_original_description: A highly practical skill that establishes a rigorous, non-performative protocol for receiving and implementing code review feedback with excellent technical safeguards.

name: regulatory-templates
author: LerianStudio
description:
3-gate regulatory template orchestrator - manages setup, Gate 1 (analysis),
Gate 2 (validation), Gate 3 (generation) for BACEN/RFB compliance.
description_zh: 一个用于巴西金融监管模板创建的高度结构化、规避风险的编排技能，强制执行严格的三阶段验证流程，以防止代价高昂的合规错误。
_original_description: A highly structured, risk-averse orchestration skill for Brazilian financial regulatory template creation, enforcing a rigorous 3-gate validation process to prevent costly compliance errors.

name: regulatory-templates-gate1
author: LerianStudio
description:
Gate 1 sub-skill - performs regulatory compliance analysis and field mapping
from template specifications.
description_zh: 用于金融监管报告场景的模板占位符到后端数据源的映射工具。强制使用snake_case命名规范和明确的数据源前缀以确保审计追溯。通过交互式验证和置信度阈值来保证映射质量。
_original_description: A specialized skill for mapping template placeholders to backend data sources in financial regulatory reporting. It enforces strict naming conventions (snake_case) and data source prefixes to ensure audit trail compliance. The skill focuses on interactive validation of field mappings with confidence thresholds.

name: regulatory-templates-gate2
author: LerianStudio
description:
Gate 2 sub-skill - validates uncertain mappings from Gate 1 and confirms
all field specifications through testing.
description_zh: 监管模板工作流的Gate 2验证子技能。使用测试数据验证Gate 1中的不确定字段映射，强制执行严格验证阈值（>90%通过率，100%必填字段验证），防止错误映射进入生产模板。在模板生成前充当质量防火墙。
_original_description: Gate 2 validation sub-skill for regulatory template workflows. Validates uncertain field mappings from Gate 1 using test data, enforces strict validation thresholds (>90% pass rate, 100% mandatory validation), and prevents incorrect mappings from reaching production templates. Acts as a quality firewall before template generation.

name: regulatory-templates-gate3
author: LerianStudio
description:
Gate 3 sub-skill - generates complete .tpl template file with all validated
mappings from Gates 1-2.
description_zh: 该技能用于金融监管报告场景，自动化生成生产就绪的Django/Jinja2模板文件。它强制执行前期工作流的严格验证，通过基于代理的生成防止人为错误，并将代码与文档分离。适用于向BACEN等金融监管机构提交数据的团队。
_original_description: This skill automates the final step of generating production-ready Django/Jinja2 template files for financial regulatory reporting. It enforces strict validation from previous workflow stages, prevents manual errors through agent-based generation, and separates code from documentation. It's designed for teams submitting data to BACEN or similar financial authorities.

name: regulatory-templates-setup
author: LerianStudio
description:
Initial setup sub-skill - handles template selection and context initialization
for the 3-gate regulatory workflow.
description_zh: 监管模板工作流的初始化子技能，负责模板选择、字典检查和上下文初始化。在下游流程执行前强制执行验证，防止金融合规文档中的错误。
_original_description: Initial setup sub-skill for regulatory template workflows that handles template selection, dictionary checks, and context initialization. Enforces strict validation before downstream gates execute, preventing errors in financial compliance documentation.

name: release-guide-info
author: LerianStudio
description:
Generate Ops Update Guide from Git Diff. Produces internal Operations-facing
update/migration guides based on git diff analysis. Supports STRICT_NO_TOUCH (default)
and TEMP_CLONE_FOR_FRESH_REFS modes. Includes tag auto-detection and commit log analysis.
description_zh: 通过分析两个Git引用之间的差异，生成面向运维团队内部的更新指南。支持严格的只读模式和临时克隆模式，自动检测版本号，可生成英文和葡萄牙语文档，并强制执行全面的变更记录规则。
_original_description: Generates internal operations update guides by analyzing git diffs between two references. Supports strict read-only mode and temporary cloning for fresh refs. Includes auto-version detection, multi-language output (English/Portuguese), and enforces comprehensive change documentation rules for ops teams.

name: resource-allocation
author: LerianStudio
description:
Resource capacity planning and allocation skill for managing people and skills
across multiple projects. Identifies conflicts, gaps, and optimization opportunities.
description_zh: 一个全面且结构清晰的资源分配框架，包含明确阶段、实用模板和有效的多项目冲突解决策略。
_original_description: A comprehensive and well-structured resource allocation framework with clear gates, practical templates, and effective conflict resolution strategies for multi-project environments.

name: ring-dev-chaos-testing
author: LerianStudio
description:
Gate 7 of development cycle - ensures chaos tests exist using Toxiproxy
to verify graceful degradation under connection loss, latency, and partitions.

name: ring-requesting-code-review
author: LerianStudio
description:
Gate 4 of development cycle - dispatches 6 specialized reviewers (code, business-logic,
security, test, nil-safety, consequences) in parallel for comprehensive code review feedback.
description_zh: 这是一个在开发周期Gate 4阶段使用的结构化代码审查技能。它并行调度三位专业评审员（代码、业务逻辑、安全），强制要求在合并前完成审查，可集成CodeRabbit等外部工具，并提供基于严重程度的问题追踪和清晰的交接指令。
_original_description:
Gate 4 of development cycle - dispatches 5 specialized reviewers (code, business-logic,
security, test, nil-safety) in parallel for comprehensive code review feedback.

name: risk-management
author: LerianStudio
description:
Portfolio-level risk management skill for identifying, assessing, and mitigating
risks across multiple projects. Maintains RAID logs and tracks risk responses.
description_zh: 该技能为项目组合级别的风险管理提供了一个结构化的多阶段流程。它系统地识别、评估、关联并规划跨多个项目的风险应对措施，维护RAID日志。包含具体的反合理化指导和抗压场景，以强化执行纪律。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured, multi-gate process for portfolio-level risk management. It systematically identifies, assesses, correlates, and plans responses for risks across multiple projects, maintaining RAID logs. It includes specific anti-rationalizations and pressure resistance guidance to enforce discipline.

name: root-cause-tracing
author: LerianStudio
description:
Backward call-chain tracing - systematically trace bugs from error location back
through call stack to original trigger. Adds instrumentation when needed.
description_zh: 一个系统化的错误追踪方法，从错误发生点反向追踪调用链以定位根本原因。提供手动追踪和代码插装的具体步骤，包含真实案例展示如何在复杂代码库中识别污染源。与systematic-debugging工作流集成。
_original_description: A systematic method for tracing bugs from error location back through call chains to find original triggers. Provides concrete steps for manual tracing and instrumentation, with real examples showing how to identify root causes in complex codebases. Integrates with systematic-debugging workflow.

name: subagent-driven-development
author: LerianStudio
description:
Autonomous plan execution - fresh subagent per task with automated code review
between tasks. No human-in-loop, high throughput with quality gates.
description_zh: 一个复杂的自主开发工作流，通过编排子代理执行任务并配合自动化多视角代码审查，在保证质量的前提下实现持续进展。
_original_description: A sophisticated autonomous development workflow that orchestrates subagents for task execution with automated multi-perspective code reviews, enabling continuous progress with quality assurance.

name: systematic-debugging
author: LerianStudio
description:
Four-phase debugging framework - root cause investigation, pattern analysis,
hypothesis testing, implementation. Ensures understanding before attempting fixes.
description_zh: 一个结构化的四阶段调试框架，强制要求在修复前进行根本原因调查。它提供了错误分析、模式比较、假设测试和实施的明确步骤，并设定了时间限制和失败阈值以防止无效尝试。
_original_description: A structured four-phase debugging framework that enforces root cause investigation before fixes. It provides concrete steps for error analysis, pattern comparison, hypothesis testing, and implementation with clear time limits and failure thresholds to prevent wasted effort.

name: test-driven-development
author: LerianStudio
description:
RED-GREEN-REFACTOR implementation methodology - write failing test first,
minimal implementation to pass, then refactor. Ensures tests verify behavior.
description_zh: 该技能通过检查测试文件是否存在并验证测试首先失败来强制执行严格的测试驱动开发流程。它提供了清晰的违规处理规则，与调试和代码审查技能集成，并包含实用的错误修复示例。该方法虽不妥协，但确保了正确的TDD纪律。
_original_description: This skill enforces strict Test-Driven Development workflow by checking for test files before implementation and verifying tests fail first. It provides clear violation handling rules, integrates with debugging and review skills, and includes practical examples for bug fixes. The approach is uncompromising but ensures proper TDD discipline.

name: testing-agents-with-subagents
author: LerianStudio
description:
Agent testing methodology - run agents with test inputs, observe outputs,
iterate until outputs are accurate and well-structured.
description_zh: 该技能将测试驱动开发原则应用于Claude智能体开发，强制要求在部署前完成RED-GREEN-REFACTOR测试周期。提供具体的测试类别、最低测试套件要求和明确的故障记录方法，防止未经验证的智能体在生产环境中出错。
_original_description: This skill applies TDD principles to Claude agent development, enforcing a strict RED-GREEN-REFACTOR cycle before deployment. It provides concrete test categories, minimum test suite requirements, and clear failure documentation. The methodology prevents deploying untested agents that could fail in production.

name: testing-anti-patterns
author: LerianStudio
description:
Test quality guard - prevents testing mock behavior, production pollution with
test-only methods, and mocking without understanding dependencies.
description_zh: 该技能识别常见的测试反模式，如测试模拟行为、向生产代码添加仅测试方法和不完整的模拟。它提供了坏实践与好实践的具体示例，并提供了防止这些问题的实用检查点。内容强调TDD作为预防措施。
_original_description: This skill identifies common testing anti-patterns like testing mock behavior, adding test-only methods to production code, and incomplete mocking. It provides concrete examples of bad vs good practices and offers practical gates to prevent these issues. The content emphasizes TDD as a preventative measure.

name: testing-skills-with-subagents
author: LerianStudio
description:
Skill testing methodology - run scenarios without skill (RED), observe failures,
write skill (GREEN), close loopholes (REFACTOR).
description_zh: 将测试驱动开发原则应用于Claude技能创建。提供具体方法：无技能运行场景（RED）、观察失败、编写技能（GREEN）、修复漏洞（REFACTOR）。包含压力场景、合理化表格和防弹技术。
_original_description: Applies test-driven development principles to Claude skill creation. Provides concrete methodology: run scenarios without skill (RED), observe failures, write skill (GREEN), close loopholes (REFACTOR). Includes pressure scenarios, rationalization tables, and bulletproofing techniques.

name: using-dev-team
author: LerianStudio
description:
9 specialist developer agents for backend (Go/TypeScript), DevOps, frontend,
design, UI implementation, QA (backend + frontend), and SRE. Dispatch when you need deep technology expertise.
description_zh: 提供7个专业开发代理，覆盖后端、运维、前端、设计、测试和SRE领域。强制使用专家调度模式，包含明确的触发条件、阻断标准和抗压规则。该技能通过要求技术决策必须委托给专家来防止直接实现。
_original_description: A skill that provides 7 specialized developer agents for backend, DevOps, frontend, design, QA, and SRE tasks. It enforces strict dispatch protocols with clear trigger conditions, blocker criteria, and pressure resistance rules. The skill prevents direct implementation by requiring specialist delegation for technical decisions.

name: using-finance-team
author: LerianStudio
description:
6 specialist financial agents for analysis, budgeting, modeling, treasury,
accounting, and metrics. Dispatch when you need deep financial expertise.
description_zh: 一个强制执行财务分析任务分派给六个领域专家代理（分析师、预算规划师、建模师、资金、会计、指标）的技能。它禁止AI直接计算，确保正确的文档记录、审计追踪和财务标准合规性。包含明确的阻断标准和抗压脚本。
_original_description: A specialized skill that enforces strict dispatch of financial analysis tasks to six domain-specific agents (analyst, budget planner, modeler, treasury, accounting, metrics). It prevents direct calculation by the main AI, ensuring proper documentation, audit trails, and compliance with financial standards. Includes explicit blocker criteria and pressure resistance scripts.

name: using-finops-team
author: LerianStudio
description:
3 FinOps agents: 2 for Brazilian financial regulatory compliance (BACEN, RFB,
Open Banking), 1 for infrastructure cost estimation when onboarding customers.
description_zh: 针对巴西金融监管合规的专业技能，提供两个FinOps代理，具有清晰的三阶段工作流程和实用的编排指导。
_original_description: A specialized skill providing two FinOps agents for Brazilian financial regulatory compliance with clear 3-gate workflow, excellent documentation, and practical orchestration guidance.

name: using-git-worktrees
author: LerianStudio
description:
Isolated workspace creation - creates git worktrees with smart directory selection
and safety verification for parallel feature development.
description_zh: 一个结构良好的技能，用于创建隔离的Git工作树，具有智能目录选择、安全验证和自动化项目设置功能，适用于并行功能开发。
_original_description: A well-structured skill for creating isolated Git worktrees with smart directory selection, safety verification, and automated project setup for parallel feature development.

name: using-ops-team
author: LerianStudio
description:
5 specialist operations agents for platform engineering, incident response,
cloud cost optimization, infrastructure architecture, and security operations.
Dispatch when you need production operations expertise.
description_zh: 提供五个生产环境运维专家代理：平台工程、事件响应、云成本优化、基础设施架构和安全运维。强制执行严格的分派协议，明确领域边界，对生产变更设置不可协商的安全检查。
_original_description: Provides five specialized operations agents for production environments: platform engineering, incident response, cloud cost optimization, infrastructure architecture, and security operations. Enforces strict dispatch protocols with clear domain boundaries and non-negotiable safety checks for production changes.

name: using-pm-team
author: LerianStudio
description:
12 pre-dev workflow skills + 4 research agents organized into Small Track (4 gates, <2 days) and
Large Track (9 gates, 2+ days) for systematic feature planning with research-first approach.
description_zh: 一个结构化的预开发工作流系统，提供小型和大型两条规划路径。它采用研究优先的方法，包含10个规划技能和3个研究代理，在编码前生成PRD、TRD和任务分解等文档。
_original_description: A structured pre-development workflow system with two tracks (Small/Large) for feature planning. It enforces research-first approach with 10 planning skills and 3 research agents, producing documents like PRDs, TRDs, and task breakdowns before coding begins.

name: using-pmm-team
author: LerianStudio
description:
7 product marketing skills + 6 specialist agents for go-to-market strategy,
positioning, messaging, competitive intelligence, and launch coordination.
description_zh: 提供7种专业营销技能和6个代理角色，用于市场分析、产品定位、信息传递、GTM规划和发布协调。包含明确触发条件和阻塞标准，可与其他Ring团队插件集成，覆盖完整产品开发生命周期。
_original_description: Provides structured workflows for product marketing tasks with 7 specialized skills and 6 agent roles. Guides users through market analysis, positioning, messaging, GTM planning, and launch coordination with clear triggers and blocker criteria. Integrates with other Ring team plugins for complete product development lifecycle.

name: using-pmo-team
author: LerianStudio
description:
6 specialist PMO agents for portfolio management, resource planning, governance,
risk analysis, executive reporting, and delivery reporting. Dispatch when you need portfolio-level oversight.
description_zh: 高度专业的PMO团队技能，具备优秀的治理框架、清晰的职责区分和强大的专家调度执行机制。
_original_description: A highly specialized PMO team skill with excellent governance frameworks, clear role distinctions, and strong enforcement of specialist dispatch patterns.

name: using-ring
author: LerianStudio
description:
Mandatory orchestrator protocol - establishes ORCHESTRATOR principle (dispatch agents,
don't operate directly) and skill discovery workflow for every conversation.
description_zh: 一个强制性的编排技能，强制执行'调度代理，不直接操作'原则。实施严格的3文件规则限制直接工具使用，要求在任何操作前完成检查点，并对多文件任务强制自动调度代理。包含上下文保存协议，在70%和85%上下文使用率时触发强制交接。
_original_description: A mandatory orchestration skill that enforces a 'dispatch agents, don't operate directly' principle. It implements a strict 3-file rule for direct tool use, requires pre-action checkpoints before any operation, and mandates automatic agent dispatch for multi-file tasks. Includes context preservation protocols with mandatory handoff triggers at 70% and 85% context usage.

name: using-tw-team
author: LerianStudio
description:
Technical writing specialists for functional and API documentation. Dispatch when
you need to create guides, conceptual docs, or API references following established
documentation standards.
description_zh: 专门用于技术文档编写的智能体工具，包含功能文档编写、API参考文档编写和文档质量审查三个专业角色。提供清晰的调度模式、写作风格标准和开发团队集成，遵循编排器原则让用户委托专家而非手动编写。
_original_description: Specialized agents for technical documentation tasks including functional guides, API references, and quality reviews. Provides clear dispatch patterns, voice/tone standards, and integration with development teams. Follows an orchestrator model where users delegate to specialized writers rather than writing manually.

name: verification-before-completion
author: LerianStudio
description:
Evidence-first completion gate - requires running verification commands and
confirming output before making any success claims.
description_zh: 一个高度规范化的技能，通过严格的验证工作流强制基于证据的完成声明，有效防止开发过程中的过早成功断言。
_original_description: A highly prescriptive skill enforcing evidence-based completion claims through strict verification workflows, preventing premature success declarations in development.

name: voice-and-tone
author: LerianStudio
description:
Voice and tone guidelines for technical documentation. Ensures consistent,
clear, and human writing across all documentation.
description_zh: 为技术文档提供具体的语气和语调规则，包含好坏写作示例。涵盖第二人称使用、句子大小写和术语等写作机制。包含供作者验证合规性的实用质量检查清单。
_original_description: Provides concrete voice and tone rules for technical documentation, including specific examples of good vs. bad writing. Covers mechanics like second-person usage, sentence case, and terminology. Includes a practical quality checklist for writers to verify compliance.

name: writing-api-docs
author: LerianStudio
description:
Patterns and structure for writing API reference documentation including
endpoint descriptions, request/response schemas, and error documentation.
description_zh: 为REST API端点文档提供结构化模板和模式，包括请求/响应模式、错误代码和字段描述。提供具体示例、HTTP状态码指导和API参考文档的质量检查清单。
_original_description: Provides structured templates and patterns for documenting REST API endpoints, including request/response schemas, error codes, and field descriptions. Offers concrete examples, HTTP status code guidance, and a quality checklist for comprehensive API reference docs.

name: writing-functional-docs
author: LerianStudio
description:
Patterns and structure for writing functional documentation including guides,
conceptual explanations, tutorials, and best practices documentation.
description_zh: 该技能为编写功能文档（如指南、教程和最佳实践）提供结构化模式。它提供不同文档类型的清晰模板、具体的写作模式、视觉元素指导和质量检查清单，帮助作者产出一致且以用户为中心的文档。
_original_description: This skill provides structured patterns for writing functional documentation like guides, tutorials, and best practices. It offers clear templates for different doc types, specific writing patterns, visual element guidance, and a quality checklist. It helps writers produce consistent, user-focused documentation.

name: writing-plans
author: LerianStudio
description:
Creates comprehensive implementation plans with exact file paths, complete code
examples, and verification steps for engineers with zero codebase context.
description_zh: 为工程师创建详细的实施计划，包含文件路径、完整代码示例和验证步骤。查询历史记录避免重复错误，验证计划规避已知问题，提供多种执行选项。
_original_description: Creates detailed implementation plans with file paths, code examples, and verification steps. Queries historical precedent to avoid past failures, validates plans against known issues, and provides multiple execution options for engineering teams.

name: writing-skills
author: LerianStudio
description:
TDD for process documentation - write test cases (pressure scenarios), watch
baseline fail, write skill, iterate until bulletproof against rationalization.
description_zh: 将测试驱动开发方法论应用于技能文档创建的元技能，为编写有效、可发现且能抵御合理化风险的技能提供系统性指导。
_original_description: A meta-skill that applies TDD methodology to skill documentation creation, providing systematic guidance for writing effective, discoverable skills that resist rationalization.

name: code-reviewer
author: MRenAIAgent
description: Use this skill after code changes are made, when reviewing implementations, checking code quality, or ensuring constitutional compliance. Apply when user mentions reviewing, analyzing, or checking code quality. Also use proactively after significant code implementations to verify they follow mini_agent framework principles.
description_zh: 一个用于对mini_agent框架进行自动化代码审查的技能，专注于检查是否符合框架章程、代码质量和最佳实践。

name: code-reviewer-advanced
author: MRenAIAgent
description: Use when reviewing code for quality, design issues, implementation problems, security vulnerabilities, or architectural concerns. Apply when user asks to review code, check implementation, find issues, or audit code quality. Use proactively after implementation is complete. Also use to provide feedback to system-architect and principal-engineer on design and implementation decisions.
description_zh: 高级代码审查技能，用于分析代码质量、设计问题、实现缺陷和安全漏洞。通过结构化流程提供架构、SOLID原则、性能和安全性方面的全面反馈。

name: planner
author: MRenAIAgent
description: Use when planning feature implementations, creating design artifacts, or structuring development tasks. Apply when user mentions planning, designing, architecting new features, or needs to break down complex features into implementation phases. Use proactively when user describes a substantial new feature to implement.
description_zh: 用于规划和构建软件功能实现的技能。它将复杂功能分解为阶段，生成设计工件，并创建全面的开发规范。

name: principal-engineer
author: MRenAIAgent
description: Use when implementing features, writing production code, providing technical feedback on designs, or making implementation decisions. Apply when user asks to implement, build, code, develop, or create software. Also use when reviewing design documents from the architect perspective of implementation feasibility. Use proactively after system design is complete.
description_zh: 首席软件工程师技能，专注于实现生产代码、提供设计技术反馈和做出实施决策。强调代码整洁、测试、架构审查和技术领导力。

name: research-agent
author: MRenAIAgent
description: Use when researching AI agents, LLMs, hosting solutions, OCR technologies, video generation models, or evaluating technology stacks. Apply when user asks to research, compare, evaluate, or investigate technologies, frameworks, models, or tools. Use proactively when technical decisions require research backing.
description_zh: 一个专业的研究助手，专注于调查、比较和评估前沿AI技术、框架和基础设施，为技术决策提供数据支持的建议。

name: system-architect
author: MRenAIAgent
description: Use when designing system architecture, creating design documents, planning technical architecture, or making high-level design decisions. Apply when user mentions system design, architecture, technical design, design docs, or asks to architect a solution. Use proactively when a feature requires architectural planning before implementation.
description_zh: 一项用于设计可扩展、稳健的系统架构，创建技术设计文档，并根据需求和约束做出高层架构决策的技能。

name: testing-agent
author: MRenAIAgent
description: Use when designing tests, implementing test cases, running tests, analyzing test coverage, or fixing test failures. Apply when user mentions testing, test cases, TDD, coverage, or asks to run tests. Use proactively after implementation is complete to ensure adequate test coverage.
description_zh: 一个专门用于设计、实施和执行软件测试的助手。它帮助制定测试策略、编写测试用例（单元、集成、端到端）、分析覆盖率并修复故障，以确保代码质量。

name: analytics-interpretation
author: MadAppGang
description: Interpret GA4 and GSC data with benchmarks, status indicators, and actionable insights
description_zh: 该技能用于解读GA4和谷歌搜索控制台数据，提供清晰的基准、状态指示和可操作的见解。它包含结构化的指标摘要模板，计算内容健康分数，并帮助识别流量质量模式和异常，以支持数据驱动的决策。
_original_description: This skill interprets GA4 and Google Search Console data with clear benchmarks, status indicators, and actionable insights. It provides structured templates for metric summaries, calculates content health scores, and helps identify traffic quality patterns and anomalies for data-driven decisions.

name: api-design
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when designing REST or GraphQL APIs, defining endpoints, implementing pagination/filtering, handling API versioning, or establishing API documentation with OpenAPI/Swagger.
description_zh: 一份全面且结构良好的参考指南，涵盖了RESTful和GraphQL API设计模式、状态码、分页、版本控制及后端开发最佳实践。
_original_description: A comprehensive and well-structured reference guide covering RESTful and GraphQL API design patterns, status codes, pagination, versioning, and best practices for backend developers.

name: api-integration
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when integrating Apidog + OpenAPI specifications with your React app. Covers MCP server setup, type generation, and query layer integration. Use when setting up API clients, generating types from OpenAPI, or integrating with Apidog MCP.
description_zh: 一个使用MCP将OpenAPI规范与React应用集成的全面指南，具有优秀的类型安全、查询层模式和实用的实现细节。
_original_description: A comprehensive guide for integrating OpenAPI specifications with React apps using MCP, featuring excellent type safety, query layer patterns, and practical implementation details.

name: api-spec-analyzer
author: MadAppGang
description: Analyzes API documentation from OpenAPI specs to provide TypeScript interfaces, request/response formats, and implementation guidance. Use when implementing API integrations, debugging API errors (400, 401, 404), replacing mock APIs, verifying data types, or when user mentions endpoints, API calls, or backend integration.
description_zh: 该技能通过分析OpenAPI规范，为前端API集成生成TypeScript接口和实现代码。它提供了针对具体项目的API服务、TanStack Query钩子和错误处理模式的具体示例，帮助开发者通过参考实际规范来避免常见的API集成错误。
_original_description: This Skill analyzes OpenAPI specs to generate TypeScript interfaces and implementation code for frontend API integration. It provides concrete examples for API services, TanStack Query hooks, and error handling patterns specific to a project. It helps developers avoid common API integration errors by referencing the actual specification.

name: architect-detective
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when analyzing architecture and system design. Find design patterns, map layers, identify core abstractions via PageRank. Uses claudemem AST structural analysis for efficient architecture investigation.
description_zh: 该技能利用claudemem的AST分析和PageRank算法映射代码库架构，识别核心抽象，追踪依赖关系，检测死代码。提供结构化工作流来分析系统边界、设计模式和依赖流向，不使用grep/find/glob命令。
_original_description: This skill uses claudemem's AST analysis with PageRank to map codebase architecture, identify core abstractions, trace dependencies, and detect dead code. It provides structured workflows for understanding system boundaries, design patterns, and dependency flows without using grep/find/glob.

name: auth-patterns
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when implementing authentication (JWT, sessions, OAuth), authorization (RBAC, ABAC), password hashing, MFA, or security best practices for backend services.
description_zh: 提供后端应用的身份验证和授权模式，包含JWT、会话认证、OAuth 2.0、密码安全、RBAC、ABAC及安全最佳实践，附带TypeScript实现示例。涵盖令牌存储、限流、账户锁定、多因素认证和刷新令牌轮换。
_original_description: Provides ready-to-use authentication and authorization patterns for backend applications, including JWT, session-based auth, OAuth 2.0, password security, RBAC, ABAC, and security best practices with TypeScript examples. Covers token storage, rate limiting, account lockout, MFA, and refresh token rotation.

name: browser-debugger
author: MadAppGang
description: Systematically tests UI functionality, validates design fidelity with AI visual analysis, monitors console output, tracks network requests, and provides debugging reports using Chrome DevTools MCP. Use after implementing UI features, for design validation, when investigating console errors, for regression testing, or when user mentions testing, browser bugs, console errors, or UI verification.
description_zh: 将Chrome DevTools与视觉模型结合，自动化UI测试、设计还原度检查和调试。为不同角色提供详细操作流程、模型选择指导和具体验证示例。专注于真实浏览器交互而非模拟测试。
_original_description: Integrates Chrome DevTools with vision models to automate UI testing, design fidelity checks, and debugging. Provides step-by-step protocols for different agent roles, model selection guidance, and concrete validation flows. Focuses on real browser interaction rather than synthetic testing.

name: browser-debugging
author: MadAppGang
description: Systematically tests UI functionality, validates design fidelity with AI visual analysis, monitors console output, tracks network requests, and provides debugging reports using Chrome Extension MCP tools. Use after implementing UI features, for design validation, when investigating console errors, for regression testing, or when user mentions testing, browser bugs, console errors, or UI verification.
description_zh: 一个全面的浏览器调试技能，提供系统化的UI测试、视觉分析和调试工作流，结合Chrome扩展MCP工具和可选的外部视觉模型进行增强验证。
_original_description: A comprehensive browser debugging skill that provides systematic UI testing, visual analysis, and debugging workflows using Chrome Extension MCP tools with optional external vision models for enhanced validation.

name: bunjs
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when building Bun.js/Hono applications, implementing HTTP endpoints, setting up Prisma/SQLite, writing Zod validation, or using Bun's test runner. See bunjs-architecture for layered patterns, bunjs-production for deployment.
description_zh: 该技能提供使用Bun、Hono和Prisma构建TypeScript后端的实用模式。包含项目结构、设置脚本、测试示例和实际开发工作流配置。文档涵盖文件操作、WebSocket设置以及使用Biome的质量检查。
_original_description: This skill provides concrete patterns for building TypeScript backends with Bun, Hono, and Prisma. It includes project structure, setup scripts, testing examples, and configuration for real development workflows. The documentation covers file operations, WebSocket setup, and quality checks with Biome.

name: bunjs-apidog
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when creating OpenAPI specs for Bun.js APIs, integrating with Apidog, documenting endpoints with schemas, or automating API specification imports via Apidog REST API. See bunjs for basics.
description_zh: 该技能为Bun.js TypeScript后端项目提供了创建OpenAPI规范并与Apidog集成的详细指南。涵盖规范结构、字段命名约定(camelCase)、模式设计，并包含用于自动导入API规范的Shell脚本。解决了常见错误场景和最佳实践。
_original_description: This skill provides detailed guidance for creating OpenAPI specifications and integrating them with Apidog for Bun.js TypeScript backends. It covers spec structure, field naming conventions (camelCase), schema design, and includes a shell script for automated API spec import. It addresses common error scenarios and best practices.

name: bunjs-architecture
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when implementing clean architecture (routes/controllers/services/repositories), establishing camelCase conventions, designing Prisma schemas, or planning structured workflows for Bun.js applications. See bunjs for basics, bunjs-production for deployment.
description_zh: 为使用分层架构构建 Bun.js TypeScript 后端提供具体模式。强制要求关注点分离（路由、控制器、服务、仓库）并在整个技术栈中强制使用 camelCase 命名规范。包含数据库设计、API 端点和实施阶段的详细工作流程。
_original_description: Provides concrete patterns for building Bun.js TypeScript backends with layered architecture. Enforces strict separation of concerns (routes, controllers, services, repositories) and mandates camelCase naming across the stack. Includes detailed workflows for database design, API endpoints, and implementation phases.

name: bunjs-production
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when deploying Bun.js to production, containerizing with Docker, setting up AWS ECS/Fargate, implementing Redis caching, hardening security, or configuring CI/CD pipelines. See bunjs for basics, bunjs-architecture for patterns.
description_zh: 为Bun.js TypeScript后端应用提供完整的Docker多阶段构建、AWS ECS任务定义、Redis缓存模式和优雅关闭处理程序。包含生产就绪的配置，如健康检查、非root用户和环境特定设置。
_original_description: Provides complete Docker multi-stage builds, AWS ECS task definitions, Redis caching patterns, and graceful shutdown handlers for Bun.js TypeScript backends. Includes production-ready configurations with health checks, non-root users, and environment-specific setups.

name: claudemem-orchestration
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when orchestrating multi-agent code analysis with claudemem. Run claudemem once, share output across parallel agents. Enables parallel investigation, consensus analysis, and role-based command mapping.
description_zh: 该技能协调多个Claude智能体共享claudemem代码分析结果，避免重复计算。提供了并行执行、会话管理和反馈整合的具体模式。通过单次运行claudemem索引来减少开销，支持角色分工和结果合并。
_original_description: This skill coordinates multiple Claude agents to share claudemem analysis results, avoiding redundant computation. It provides concrete patterns for parallel execution, session management, and feedback consolidation. The approach reduces claudemem indexing overhead by running it once per investigation.

name: claudemem-search
author: MadAppGang
description: ⚡ PRIMARY TOOL for semantic code search AND structural analysis. NEW: AST tree navigation with map, symbol, callers, callees, context commands. PageRank ranking. Recommended workflow: Map structure first, then search semantically, analyze callers before modifying.
description_zh: 提供代码库的语义搜索和基于AST的结构分析。功能包括符号定位、调用图分析、PageRank排名和版本感知的命令回退。输出机器可读格式以便代理集成。
_original_description: Provides semantic code search and AST-based structural analysis for codebases. Features include symbol location, call graph analysis, PageRank ranking, and version-aware command fallbacks. Outputs machine-readable format for agent integration.

name: claudish-usage
author: MadAppGang
description: CRITICAL - Guide for using Claudish CLI ONLY through sub-agents to run Claude Code with OpenRouter models (Grok, GPT-5, Gemini, MiniMax). NEVER run Claudish directly in main context unless user explicitly requests it. Use when user mentions external AI models, Claudish, OpenRouter, or alternative models. Includes mandatory sub-agent delegation patterns, agent selection guide, file-based instructions, and strict rules to prevent context window pollution.
description_zh: 一个指导AI代理通过Claudish CLI将Claude Code执行委托给外部模型（如Grok、GPT-5、Gemini）的技能。它强制使用子代理模式来避免污染主上下文，并提供决策树、代理选择指南和基于文件的工作流。
_original_description: A skill for AI agents to delegate Claude Code execution to external models via Claudish CLI, enforcing sub-agent patterns to prevent context pollution. It provides decision trees, agent selection guides, and file-based workflows for using models like Grok, GPT-5, and Gemini through OpenRouter.

name: code-search-selector
author: MadAppGang
description: 💡 Tool selector for code search tasks. Helps choose between semantic search (claudemem) and native tools (Grep/Glob) based on query type. Semantic search recommended for: 'how does X work', 'find all', 'audit', 'investigate', 'architecture'.
description_zh: 一个设计良好的技能，用于强制在代码搜索任务中选择最优工具，防止在claudemem语义搜索可用时仍使用低效的grep命令。
_original_description: A well-designed skill that enforces optimal tool selection for code search tasks, preventing inefficient grep usage when semantic search is available through claudemem.

name: content-brief
author: MadAppGang
description: Content brief template and creation methodology for SEO-optimized content. Use when preparing briefs for writers or planning new content pieces.
description_zh: 提供创建SEO内容简报的结构化模板和方法论。指导用户完成关键词研究、搜索结果分析和内容大纲制定，包含明确的撰稿要求。附带质量检查清单和E-E-A-T合规性要求。
_original_description: Provides a structured template and methodology for creating SEO content briefs. Guides users through keyword research, SERP analysis, and outlining with specific requirements for writers. Includes checklists for quality control and E-E-A-T compliance.

name: content-optimizer
author: MadAppGang
description: On-page SEO optimization techniques including keyword density, meta tags, heading structure, and readability. Use when optimizing existing content or validating new content against SEO requirements.
description_zh: 全面的SEO内容优化指南，包含清晰指标、实用检查清单和可操作改进技巧，适合内容创作者使用。
_original_description: A comprehensive SEO content optimization guide with clear metrics, practical checklists, and actionable improvement techniques for content creators.

name: context-detection
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when detecting project technology stack from files/configs/directory structure, auto-loading framework-specific skills, or analyzing multi-stack fullstack projects (e.g., React + Go).
description_zh: 该技能通过分析配置文件、目录结构和文件扩展名来检测项目技术栈。它支持全栈项目的多技术栈检测，并将检测结果映射到Claude开发插件的特定技能路径。检测遵循明确的优先级顺序，并包含针对模糊情况的错误处理。
_original_description: This skill detects project technology stacks by analyzing config files, directory structures, and file extensions. It supports multi-stack detection for fullstack projects and maps findings to specific skill paths for Claude's dev plugin. The detection follows a clear priority order and includes error handling for ambiguous cases.

name: core-principles
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when planning new projects, onboarding, or reviewing architectural decisions. Core principles and project structure for React 19 SPA development. Covers stack overview, project organization, agent execution rules, and authoritative sources.
description_zh: 为基于React 19、TypeScript和Vite的单页应用开发提供具体的架构指南。包含项目结构、执行规则、TanStack Router与Query集成模式。提供PR完成清单和权威文档参考。
_original_description: Provides concrete architectural guidelines for React 19 SPA development with TypeScript and Vite. Includes specific project structure, execution rules, and integration patterns for TanStack Router and Query. Offers checklists for PR completion and references to authoritative documentation sources.

name: cross-plugin-detective
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when integrating detective skills across plugins. Maps agent roles to appropriate detective skills (developer → developer-detective, architect → architect-detective). Reference this to connect agents with claudemem investigation capabilities.
description_zh: 一个结构良好的集成指南，标准化了跨插件的侦探技能使用，强制实施索引内存模式，并提供清晰的角色到技能映射，确保代码调查工作流程的一致性。
_original_description: A well-structured integration guide that standardizes detective skill usage across plugins, enforcing indexed memory patterns and providing clear role-to-skill mappings for consistent code investigation workflows.
